author: lOrm
content:
Deferred — owner-level architectural refactor (unifies three session formats; changes on-disk format compatibility).

**Fix outline:** Consolidate on a single pub struct Session in src/session/mod.rs with the union of fields (id, title, created_at, updated_at, model, provider, messages, token_estimate, undo_stack, behavioral_mode, etc.). Delete TuiSession (src/tui/app.rs:27-127) and CLI ChatSession (src/cli/repl/mod.rs); both seams reuse Session. Move sessions_dir() / save_session / list_sessions out of tui/app.rs into a shared src/session/io.rs. Per the project's stated TUI/Claude-Code parity goal, the target is Claude Code's ~/.claude/sessions single-format store.

**Recommendation:** Touches session persistence format (backward-compat for existing user session files is an owner decision) AND requires moving file IO out of the TUI module. Defer.
